CustomField.description: Calculates days since Billing Call or Webinar Date IF Billing Call or Webinar Status = Complete. If Status ≠ Complete, Days Since will be null.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculates days since Billing Call or Webinar Date IF Billing Call or Webinar Status = Complete. If Status ≠ Complete, Days Since will be null.
CustomField.label: Days Since Initial Billing Call Complete
